commit.message:
Add update, commit, and rollback listener support

Wraps SQLiteUpdateListener and SQLiteCommitListener with idiomatic
Clojure APIs: add-*-listener!, remove-*-listener!, and with-*-listener
macros. Listener wrapping is memoized so add/remove with the same fn
works correctly. add-*-listener! returns a zero-arg deregistration fn
with the underlying Java listener as metadata.

commit.message:
fix(tasks): derive TASKS.md path per-project from state.rootDir

Previously tasksMarkdownFilePath was set once from the server's CWD and
shared across all projects, causing import/sync to read the same file for
every project regardless of which project was selected.

Now both importFromTasksMarkdown and syncFromTasksMarkdown resolve the
TASKS.md path from state.rootDir at call time. The constructor option
remains as an explicit override (used in tests); when absent the path
defaults to rootDir/TASKS.md per project.

Removes the hardcoded resolve(input.cwd, "TASKS.md") from server.ts.

commit.message:
Add single-instance enforcement so double-clicking .md opens a new tab in existing Quill window

Uses tauri-plugin-single-instance to intercept second launches on Windows.
The running instance receives the file path, reads it, and emits open-file
to JS which opens it as a new tab. Window is focused/unminimized automatically.
macOS already handled this correctly via RunEvent::Opened.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace vs-learn polling with hook-driven learning

vs-learn now uses preexec/precmd hooks instead of a background
subshell polling file modification times. Commands are classified
in real-time with time-decayed scoring (2-min half-life). Locks in
when confident: winner >= 15pts, 5pt lead, 2+ real-time signals.

No background processes, no daemons, no find polling. <1ms per
command, ~5ms evaluation throttled to every 5s.

commit.message:
Fix Windows compilation: add signgam compat header for core-math lgamma.c

The CORE-MATH lgamma.c references `signgam`, a POSIX global declared
in <math.h> on glibc but absent from the Windows CRT. Add a compat
header with `extern int signgam;` guarded by `#if _WIN32`, and inject
it via CFLAGS/CPATH in .cargo/config.toml so the cc crate picks it up
when building core-math-sys.

Fixes: https://github.com/dollspace-gay/ferray/issues/5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 5 critical fires — server-side uploads, cache invalidation, dedup, indexes

Fire 1: Switch UploadPage from client-side orchestrateUpload() to
server-side process-upload Edge Function. Browser uploads to Storage,
Edge Function parses and inserts — browser never touches raw data.

Fire 2+3: Add dashboard cache invalidation to useRealtimeUploads hook.
When data_uploads status flips to "ready", all 11 dashboard query keys
are invalidated so data appears without manual refresh.

Fire 4: Add server-side duplicate file check (name+size+project) in
process-upload Edge Function, returning 409 on match. Add UNIQUE INDEX
idx_sell_out_dedup on (project_id, date, retailer, sku, store_location).

Fire 5: Add 5 composite partial indexes for faster RPC aggregation:
sell_out_data (project_id,date), (project_id,retailer),
(project_id,sku,date); campaign_data_v2 (project_id,platform),
(project_id,flight_start).

commit.message:
Add attention maps and extended config metadata to v4 embedding pipeline

- Extract head-averaged CLS-to-patch attention from last transformer layer
  via AttentionHook class (forward hook + QKV recomputation)
- Store attention maps as pa.list_(pa.float32()) in image embeddings table
- Move lancedb import inside main() to avoid fork-safety warning in workers
- Add reproducibility metadata to config: git commit/branch/dirty,
  script name/sha256, timm preprocessing params (interpolation, mean, std,
  crop_pct), raw table row count, limit, mp_start_method
- Write post-run stats to config: processed_image_count, elapsed_seconds,
  throughput_img_per_sec

commit.message:
Fix domain classification: reorder checks, add computer/audio/office patterns

- Move computer boot ROM check BEFORE manufacturer-based arcade check,
  since NEC/Atari/Casio make both arcade boards and home computers
- Add 40+ home computer machine name patterns (pc6*, pc8*, pc9*, cpc*,
  zx*, bbc*, apple*, vic*, cbm*, trs80*, kaypro*, etc.)
- Add V.Smile/VTech to game console patterns
- Add audio device category (Korg, Roland, Yamaha, Kurzweil, etc.)
- Add office equipment category (Brother, Canon, Epson typewriters)
- Add terminal patterns (Wyse, VT100, TeleVideo)
- Remove aggressive Z80/6502→GAME_CONSOLE CPU fallback — these CPUs
  are used in computers and peripherals too, use GENERIC when unknown

Tested: PC-6601→COMPUTER_BOOT, Elwro800→COMPUTER_BOOT, LW-30→GENERIC,
V.Smile→GAME_CONSOLE, Saturn→GAME_CONSOLE, DreamWriter→COMPUTER_BOOT,
Alphatronic→COMPUTER_BOOT, WY-60→GENERIC

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add ASM-based JIT compiler for SPnuts JVM target

Implements a bytecode compiler that compiles Pnuts AST nodes to JVM
bytecode at runtime, with interpreted fallback for unsupported nodes.

Components:
- ScopeAnalyzer: pre-pass identifies params, safe JVM-slot locals, and
  captured variables that must go through Context
- CodeGen: ASM MethodVisitor-based code generator; handles literals,
  arithmetic/comparison/logical operators, variables, control flow
  (if/while/for/for-each), collections (list/map/range), try/catch,
  string interpolation, Java interop (new/cast/instanceof), records,
  import/package
- CompiledHelper: static helper methods called from generated bytecode
  via INVOKESTATIC; delegates to Interpreter public API
- Compiler: entry points compileScript/compileFunc; in-memory class
  loading via SpnutsClassLoader; slotBase=1 for function bodies to
  account for the args[] parameter slot
- CompilerSpec: 39 tests verifying compiled output matches interpreter

Key design decisions:
- All values are boxed Object on the JVM stack
- Params use JVM local slots; other locals use extraLocals map with
  deferred slot allocation; captured vars go through Context
- Comparison ops (eq/lt/gt/le/ge) return Z, need separate descriptor
  and Boolean.valueOf boxing
- slotBase parameter shifts all slot numbers for function bodies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: disk-cached DB queries + retry for Vercel builds

Vercel builds were timing out after ~13min of sustained Azure SQL queries
(1063 static pages). Now all 40 query functions use cachedQuery() which:
- Checks .next/cache/sql/ first (preserved between Vercel deploys)
- On cache miss, queries DB with retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff)
- Caches successful results to disk for future builds
- Never caches failures

First build populates cache. Subsequent UI-only deploys skip DB entirely.
Cache bust: set DB_CACHE_VERSION env var or use Vercel "Redeploy without cache".

Also: request timeout 30s → 60s, pool reset on retry for stale connections.

commit.message:
fix: detect stale index after fmm upgrade

Compare stored fmm_version in DB against running binary version on
open. If they differ, bail with a clear message to regenerate. Prevents
silently using an index that lacks features from newer parser versions
(e.g. ALP-922 nested symbol extraction).
